channel.title: 4minit — Mauritius News in 4 Minutes
channel.description: A free daily newsletter covering Mauritius news, regional developments, and the global headlines that matter.

item.title: Your electricity bill just got more expensive, and that's just the start
item.description: London puts the Chagos deal on ice. Iran's new Supreme Leader: wounded and out of sight. Oil tops $100 as US blockades Iranian ports.

item.title: UK puts the Chagos deal on ice, and Mauritius is left waiting
item.description: Bread up, electricity up: the cabinet's crisis playbook. Ethiopia's Easter, overshadowed by fuel queues. Artemis crew splashes down after first Moon flyby in 52 years.

item.title: Bread up 50%, electricity up 15%: Mauritius starts paying the Middle East bill
item.description: Chagos bill pulled from King's Speech after Trump's reversal. Six terms, 97.8%: meet Djibouti's forever president. JD Vance arrives in Islamabad for landmark US-Iran talks.
